statement: In every magma, Equation 2966 (`x = ((y * (y * z)) * z) * z`) implies Equation 3376 (`x * y = y * (z * (w * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0309
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y z)) z) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op y (op z (op w z)))
